description_long: This is a large, black Chevrolet SUV-style vehicle with a robust and boxy design, featuring four passenger doors and a rear hatch. The exterior is predominantly black with subtle chrome accents on the front grille and door handles. The vehicle has tinted windows, large side mirrors, and prominent wheel arches housing sturdy tires. The rear of the vehicle displays a Chevrolet badge and a rear wiper, with red tail lights integrated into the corners. The roof is smooth and slightly raised, suggesting ample interior headroom. The overall build and proportions indicate a focus on passenger comfort and cargo capacity rather than a traditional open cargo bed.
description: A large, black Chevrolet SUV with four doors, chrome accents, and a robust, boxy design. It features tinted windows, prominent wheel arches, and a rear hatch.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the Chevrolet badge, rear hatch, and red tail lights.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting four doors, tinted windows, and large wheels.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the chrome grille, headlights, and side mirrors.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing four doors and the vehicle's length.
